'''âv-y-s''' ('''kavayas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:praccy|praccy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praccy|praccy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-y-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavayas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivayas|thivayas]] || [[word:jivayas|jivayas]] || [[word:shivayas|shivayas]] || [[word:kivayas|kivayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvayas|thuthuvayas]] || [[word:jujuvayas|jujuvayas]] || [[word:shushuvayas|shushuvayas]] || [[word:kukuvayas|kukuvayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvayas|thuvayas]] || [[word:juvayas|juvayas]] || [[word:shuvayas|shuvayas]] || [[word:kuvayas|kuvayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvayas|thuvayas]] || [[word:juvayas|juvayas]] || [[word:shuvayas|shuvayas]] || [[word:kuvayas|kuvayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevayas|thevayas]] || [[word:jevayas|jevayas]] || [[word:shevayas|shevayas]] || [[word:kevayas|kevayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovayas|thothovayas]] || [[word:jojovayas|jojovayas]] || [[word:shoshovayas|shoshovayas]] || [[word:kokovayas|kokovayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovayas|thovayas]] || [[word:jovayas|jovayas]] || [[word:shovayas|shovayas]] || [[word:kovayas|kovayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovayas|thovayas]] || [[word:jovayas|jovayas]] || [[word:shovayas|shovayas]] || [[word:kovayas|kovayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvayas|thĂŠvayas]] || [[word:jĂŠvayas|jĂŠvayas]] || [[word:shĂŠvayas|shĂŠvayas]] || [[word:kĂŠvayas|kĂŠvayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavayas|thathavayas]] || [[word:jajavayas|jajavayas]] || [[word:shashavayas|shashavayas]] || [[word:kakavayas|kakavayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavayas|thavayas]] || [[word:javayas|javayas]] || [[word:shavayas|shavayas]] || [[word:kavayas|kavayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavayas|thavayas]] || [[word:javayas|javayas]] || [[word:shavayas|shavayas]] || [[word:kavayas|kavayas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavayas|shavayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavayas|goshavayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavayas|gokishavayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavayasnĂŒ|shavayasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavayasnknĂŒ|goshavayasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayasnĂŒ|gokishavayasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavayashĂ«|shavayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavayasnkshĂ«|goshavayasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavayashĂ«|gokishavayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayasro|shavayasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayasnkro|goshavayasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayasro|gokishavayasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayasmu|shavayasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayasnkmu|goshavayasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayasmu|gokishavayasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavayasher|shavayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavayasnksher|goshavayasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavayasher|gokishavayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavayasng|shavayasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavayasnkng|goshavayasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavayasng|gokishavayasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavayasya|shavayasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavayasnkya|goshavayasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavayasya|gokishavayasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavayasyam|shavayasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavayasnkyam|goshavayasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavayasyam|gokishavayasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayasnĂŒshĂ«|shavayasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavayasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavayasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayasnĂŒro|shavayasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayasnknĂŒro|goshavayasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayasnĂŒro|gokishavayasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayasnĂŒmu|shavayasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayasnknĂŒmu|goshavayasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayasnĂŒmu|gokishavayasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayashĂ«nĂŒ|shavayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavayasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayashĂ«ro|shavayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayasnkshĂ«ro|goshavayasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayashĂ«ro|gokishavayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayashĂ«mu|shavayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayasnkshĂ«mu|goshavayasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayashĂ«mu|gokishavayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayasronĂŒ|shavayasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayasnkronĂŒ|goshavayasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayasronĂŒ|gokishavayasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayasroshĂ«|shavayasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayasnkroshĂ«|goshavayasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayasroshĂ«|gokishavayasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayasromu|shavayasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayasnkromu|goshavayasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayasromu|gokishavayasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayasmunĂŒ|shavayasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayasnkmunĂŒ|goshavayasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayasmunĂŒ|gokishavayasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayasmushĂ«|shavayasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayasnkmushĂ«|goshavayasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayasmushĂ«|gokishavayasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayasmuro|shavayasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayasnkmuro|goshavayasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayasmuro|gokishavayasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
